title: QSProtecciones
description: Advanced and user-friendly region management plugin for servers using ProtectionStones and WorldGuard.
body:
This Minecraft plugin offers advanced yet simple management of protected regions on your server. It is designed to integrate with ProtectionStones and WorldGuard, allowing both administrators and players to easily view and manage their regions through interactive menus.

Key Features:

- Detailed visualization of protected regions, including owners, members, coordinates, and last activity.
- Intuitive menus for browsing, selecting, and managing regions.
- Administrative options to modify flags, add or remove members, teleport to regions, and delete protections.
- Multiverse support to manage regions across different server worlds.
- Customizable messaging system using MiniMessage and Adventure API for enhanced visual experience.
- Performance optimization with region caching and controls to prevent empty menus from opening.
- Fully compatible with modern versions of Minecraft (Paper/Spigot).

This plugin simplifies region management, making the experience more fluid and visual—ideal for servers using ProtectionStones and aiming to offer advanced, user-friendly tools to players and administrators.

You can view it on Spigot: https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/quesitoprotections.125206/
